notes: v2.4 keeps the v2.3.1 visual lock and changes the core interaction model to expression first, verification later. Users can write one sentence and generate a private Cloud Card without scanning a boarding pass; flight verification is only required for same-flight publishing, comments, and same-flight recall notifications. Public surfaces must not show specific seat numbers. Figma Make handoff now asks to rerun the core screens around 00a/01a/02-05/06/07/08/15/16 with this gating model.

new_screens: 16 Shared Card Landing / Same Flight Notes
major_modified_screens: 00b Permission Primer (notification is Stage 1, not gray)
06 Compose (one-line first, templates, voice-to-text, offline states)
07 Card Studio (Cloud Card as acquisition asset)
09 Flight Space (same-flight notification entry + offline sync state)
new_scenarios_added: S9 offline writing and landing sync
S10 Cloud Card share landing acquisition
founder_decisions_needed: D5 notifications enter Stage 1, limited to boarding reminder and same-flight new-note recall
D6 one sentence is a completed publishable unit
D7 Cloud Card has no download CTA and links to same-flight notes

known_risks.low_frequency_context: v2.3 improves activation and sharing inside a low-frequency flight context but does not remove the underlying low-frequency risk.
known_risks.cloud_card_quality: Organic acquisition depends on Cloud Card being worth sharing as an image, not as an app promotion.
known_risks.offline_engineering_cost: Offline draft, local card preview, sync queue, retry, and failure states are Stage 1 requirements.

v2_3_1_changes_vs_v2_3.visual_direction_locked: Default Cloud Card uses vintage boarding postcard / ticket-stub paper direction based on GPT Image 2 card review.
demoted_templates: cloud_window / photo overlay templates are optional and should only be recommended when user text and photo mood match
v2_3_1_changes_vs_v2_3.first_open_change: 00a must lead with '登机前 30 分钟，给这趟飞行留一句话' and show the postcard idea immediately.
v2_3_1_changes_vs_v2_3.ui_system_change: Dark UI is atmosphere only; compose, settings, reading, and form surfaces use paper/light cards.
v2_3_1_changes_vs_v2_3.wechat_green_constraint: #07C160 is only allowed on the WeChat login button; connected states use subdued blue-gray/ink-green/stamp treatment.
v2_3_1_changes_vs_v2_3.ugc_quality_safety: Design must handle ordinary UGC such as '飞机晚点了，累死。' without aesthetic collapse.

v2_4_changes_vs_v2_3_1.core_interaction_change: Expression first, verification later. Writing and private Cloud Card generation do not require boarding pass scanning.
v2_4_changes_vs_v2_3_1.verification_gate: Flight verification is required only for same-flight publishing, same-flight comments, and same-flight new-note notifications.
v2_4_changes_vs_v2_3_1.privacy_fix: Public surfaces must not show specific seat numbers; use fuzzy labels such as window-side passenger or aisle-side passenger.
v2_4_changes_vs_v2_3_1.figma_make_update: Handoff and prompt now ask Figma Make to rerun core screens with private share and same-flight publish split.

previous_approval.note: Approve v2.4 via orchestrate.ts approve pm --project=head_in_clouds before downstream dev execution.
